title: Project Manager
description_raw:
Capita Resourcing are seeking an experienced Project Manager for a 6-month contract assignment. The role involves managing the delivery of a mechanical engineering programme for an industrial client.

Key responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain the project plan and milestone schedule
- Manage the risk register and RAID log throughout the project lifecycle
- Stakeholder management across the client team and specialist subcontractors
- Administer NEC4 contracts and manage change control

Requirements:
- 5+ years project management experience in a mechanical or process engineering environment
- PRINCE2 or APM PMQ qualified

Rate: £500–£550 per day outside IR35
Duration: 6 months
